    • Method Detail

      • resize

        public void resize(float dx,
          float dy,
          ResizeDirection direction)
        resize the shadowed objects in the specified direction of the specified amount.
        Specified by:
        resize in interface BlockShadowPainter
        Overrides:
        resize in class NodeFigure.SPainter
        Parameters:
        dx - is the amount of the resizing.
        dy - is the amount of the resizing.
        direction - is the direction of the resizing.
